{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-45057", "cvss": {"score": 4.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:H/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 4.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:H/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-345", "name": "Insufficient Verification of Data Authenticity"}], "description": "### Impact
The message edit validation logic in the  `matrix-sdk-ui` crate before 0.16.1 is missing a check: when replacing an encrypted event, the replacement event itself is not required to be encrypted. This enables a malicious homeserver administrator (or an actor with equivalent power) to impersonate or spoof messages as if they were sent by a victim user.

### Patches
`matrix-sdk-ui` 0.16.1 fixes the message edit validation logic to align with the algorithm for replacement events[^1] described in the Matrix specification.

### Workarounds
N/A

### References
* Pull request: https://github.com/matrix-org/matrix-rust-sdk/pull/6454

### For more information
If you have any questions or comments about this advisory, please email us at [security at matrix.org](mailto:security@matrix.org).

[^1]: https://spec.matrix.org/unstable/client-server-api/#validity-of-replacement-events", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00019, "percentile": 0.05272}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-h97m-27fx-42rx", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-04T14:50:47Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-h97m-27fx-42rx", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-h97m-27fx-42rx"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-45057"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-04T14:50:47Z", "references": ["https://github.com/matrix-org/matrix-rust-sdk/security/advisories/GHSA-h97m-27fx-42rx", "https://github.com/matrix-org/matrix-rust-sdk/pull/6454", "https://github.com/matrix-org/matrix-rust-sdk/releases/tag/matrix-sdk-0.16.1", "https://rustsec.org/advisories/RUSTSEC-2026-0158.html", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-h97m-27fx-42rx"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/matrix-org/matrix-rust-sdk/security-advisories/GHSA-h97m-27fx-42rx", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/matrix-org/matrix-rust-sdk", "summary": "matrix-sdk-ui: Incomplete edit validation", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-04T14:50:47Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-h97m-27fx-42rx", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.16.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "matrix-sdk-ui"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.16.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: matrix-sdk-ui: Incomplete edit validation
